title: The harness wires its own graph. Forme commits the active graph as a versioned truth; invalid candidates cannot corrupt scheduling.

beats.name: cold-start
beats.caption: the seed wires the control plane · Forme commits the FIRST valid active graph

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: byte-identical source re-scans · the whole graph memo-skips · Forme never wakes

beats.name: immaterial-edit
beats.caption: a reflowed comment · the contract-set facet holds · Forme skips (topology memoization)

beats.name: valid-addition
beats.caption: a new responsibility (risk-digest) · active-graph moves · the schedule replans

beats.name: ambiguous-candidate
beats.caption: a duplicate CompetitorActivity producer · Forme REJECTS · active-graph HELD · schedule skips

beats.name: operator-pin
beats.caption: an operator pins the intended producer · Forme commits the new valid active graph

beats.name: bad-cycle
beats.caption: a 2-node cycle · Forme REJECTS · active-graph HELD · schedule skips · prior graph stands

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: byte-identical re-scans · steady on the last valid active graph · the cycle never entered it
